requirement_topic.en: EgyptERA / EETC Grid-Connection Code and Net-Metering Route
requirement_topic.zh: EgyptERA / EETC 并网规范与净计量路径
requirement_topic.zht: EgyptERA / EETC 併網規範與淨計量路徑

summary.en: EgyptERA publishes electricity codes including the Egyptian Transmission Grid Code, a low-voltage solar-cell project connection code, and a code for connecting solar stations on medium- and high-voltage networks. EgyptERA also publishes renewable-energy connection documents and net-metering circulars. Grid-connected inverter projects therefore need project-specific acceptance by the relevant network operator, such as EETC or the distribution company.
summary.zh: EgyptERA 发布电力规范，包括埃及输电网规范、低压太阳能电池项目接入技术规范，以及中高压太阳能电站接入规范。EgyptERA 还发布可再生能源接入文件和净计量通告。因此，并网逆变器项目需要由 EETC 或配电公司等相关网络运营方进行项目级认可。
summary.zht: EgyptERA 發布電力規範，包括埃及輸電網規範、低壓太陽能電池項目接入技術規範，以及中高壓太陽能電站接入規範。EgyptERA 還發布再生能源接入文件和淨計量通告。因此，併網逆變器項目需要由 EETC 或配電公司等相關網路營運方進行項目級認可。

standards_or_laws: Technical specification code for connecting solar cell projects to the low voltage grid
Code of technical specifications for connecting solar stations on medium and high voltage networks

summary.en: China grid-connection evidence commonly cites GB/T 19964 and inverter test reports against GB/T 37408 or related NB/T rules. These documents are not a substitute for Egyptian grid-code parameter review, relay settings, anti-islanding review, metering arrangement, or local network approval.
summary.zh: 中国并网证据通常引用 GB/T 19964 以及依据 GB/T 37408 或相关 NB/T 规则形成的逆变器测试报告。这些文件不能替代埃及并网参数审查、继电保护设置、防孤岛审查、计量安排或当地网络批准。
summary.zht: 中國併網證據通常引用 GB/T 19964 以及依據 GB/T 37408 或相關 NB/T 規則形成的逆變器測試報告。這些文件不能替代埃及併網參數審查、繼電保護設定、防孤島審查、計量安排或當地網路批准。

gap.en: The export file should include an Egypt settings sheet for voltage and frequency trip windows, reactive-power behavior, anti-islanding, reconnection, remote dispatch or curtailment where relevant, and net-metering or feed-in documentation for the actual project capacity and voltage level.
gap.zh: 出口资料应包括埃及设置表，覆盖电压和频率跳闸窗口、无功行为、防孤岛、重连、适用时的远程调度或限发，以及针对实际项目容量和电压等级的净计量或上网电价文件。
gap.zht: 出口資料應包括埃及設定表，覆蓋電壓和頻率跳脫窗口、無功行為、防孤島、重連、適用時的遠端調度或限發，以及針對實際項目容量和電壓等級的淨計量或上網電價文件。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory for grid connection where the inverter is installed in an Egyptian grid-connected PV project; net-metering or tariff documents are mandatory only for projects using those routes
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory or project-specific for Chinese grid-connected PV projects; not transferable as Egyptian network approval

source.publisher: Egyptian Electric Utility and Consumer Protection Regulatory Agency (EgyptERA)

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Chinese grid-code tests are a starting point only. Egypt requires project-level grid-code and metering acceptance by the relevant Egyptian network route.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 中国并网测试只是起点。埃及需要按相关埃及网络路径完成项目级并网规范和计量认可。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 中國併網測試只是起點。埃及需要按相關埃及網路路徑完成項目級併網規範和計量認可。
